invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破1900（基于ATR 24.57和日线支撑）或融资费率超过0.01%（轧多风险），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 1900 (based on ATR 24.57 and daily support) or funding rate exceeds 0.01% (long squeeze risk).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破580（基于ATR 6.65和支撑位）或融资费率转正超过0.01%（空头平仓结束），则假设失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 580 (based on ATR 6.65 and support) or funding rate turns positive above 0.01% (short covering ends).
